title: Front Office Manager - India Tourism Development Corporation - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - India Tourism Development Corporation - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
India Tourism Development Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Tourism Development Corporation:
India Tourism Development Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Tourism Development Corporation!
